checkpoint_policy.crash_loss_bound: at most the current gene or current literature page

honest_ceiling: Computation over released data, not wet-lab or clinical truth.

phase_1_genome_wide_atlas_rules.associative_only_threshold: strongest on-target n_total_de_genes between 0 and 10 inclusive when no comparable explicit driver claim is under test
phase_1_genome_wide_atlas_rules.gene_universe: all genes in examples/data/marson_de_full.csv grouped by target_contrast_gene_name
phase_1_genome_wide_atlas_rules.not_assayed_rule: no on-target KD row across all Marson conditions, or gene absent from a comparator

specificity_rules.k562: K562 coverage is genome-wide enough to score broad non-immune transfer; k562_de above 25 is a specificity warning
specificity_rules.rpe1: RPE1 sparse coverage is context only; missing RPE1 is not_assayed and never a blocking failure
specificity_rules.schmidt: cytokine-production non-hits are orthogonal_phenotype unless the claim is specifically cytokine output
specificity_rules.shifrut: primary T-cell support where the frozen ORCS bundle covers the gene

phase_1_genome_wide_atlas_rules.strongest_effect: maximum n_total_de_genes among on-target KD rows across Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr

claim_extraction.cd4_context_required: CD4, T cell, T-cell, T lymphocyte, helper T, or TCR in title or abstract
claim_extraction.claim_sentence: title or abstract sentence containing a gene and a driver word
claim_extraction.gene_mapping: uppercase approved symbols and aliases from frozen Marson symbols plus common checkpoint aliases

comparability_rules.comparable: activation, TCR stimulation, CD4 T-cell state, transcriptional program, proliferation only when the claim is proliferation-specific
comparability_rules.contradiction_requires: explicit driver claim plus comparable readout plus Marson on-target strongest effect at or below 10 DE genes
comparability_rules.orthogonal: cytokine secretion, exhaustion marker expression, disease association, immunotherapy response, or generic importance without an activation-driver readout
comparability_rules.support_requires: explicit driver claim plus comparable readout plus Marson on-target strongest effect above 10 DE genes

phase_2_literature_audit_rules.corpus_source: Europe PMC open API with PubMed IDs retained where available
phase_2_literature_audit_rules.dedupe_key: pmid plus gene plus normalized claim sentence
query_plan: human CD4 T cell activation regulator
CD4 T cell transcriptional regulator activation
T cell activation checkpoint regulator CD4
CRISPR CD4 T cell regulator activation

phase_3_defended_leaderboard_rules.candidate_source: phase 1 genome-wide drivers absent from CollecTRI and standard T-cell regulator annotations
phase_3_defended_leaderboard_rules.falsifiable_experiment_template: CRISPRi knockdown in stimulated primary human CD4+ T cells with at least two guides, non-targeting and activation-pathway controls, activation-marker flow and RNA readout; refuted if on-target knockdown does not shift the registered activation program or only shifts a broad viability signature

kill_attempts.fails_if: no on-target stimulated perturbation, failed knockdown, or off-target warning explains the effect
Rest reach, K562 transfer, RPE1 covered transfer, or DepMap dependency better explains the signal as general machinery
a comparable frozen primary T-cell perturbation screen directly tests and does not support the driver claim
the frozen evidence supports downstream expression or association rather than causal perturbation
STRING, pathway, disease, or chemistry evidence points to another node as the better causal explanation

phase_3_defended_leaderboard_rules.noncoverage_policy: not_assayed is reported and never counted as a contradiction
phase_3_defended_leaderboard_rules.required_hook: disease-genetics link, druggable target or compound evidence, or a decisive correction of a named consensus claim

source_inventory.name: cross_validation_sources
source_inventory.role: frozen Shifrut, Schmidt, DICE, STRING source bundle

typed_status_ladder.associative_only: gene is present in an external signature or literature context, but perturbation does not support a causal driver role and no comparable driver claim is refuted
typed_status_ladder.contradicted: an explicit causal or driver claim with a comparable readout is refuted by on-target perturbation evidence
typed_status_ladder.evidence_attached: on-target perturbation has a causal activation-program effect in the comparable substrate, but remains proposal-only
typed_status_ladder.not_assayed: gene is absent, lacks on-target perturbation, or the comparator does not cover it
typed_status_ladder.orthogonal_phenotype: the comparator tests a different phenotype or readout, so it cannot support or contradict the activation-transcriptome claim
typed_status_ladder.refuted: reserved for a stronger future packet where multiple comparable frozen sources overturn the same explicit claim
